interface.name: niri_wallpaper_manager_v1

description.summary: associate layer surfaces with specific workspaces

interface.description: Allows a client to tag a background-layer surface as belonging to a specific workspace on its output. During workspace overview, niri will composite a tagged surface only behind its declared workspace. Untagged background surfaces keep the existing behavior (shown behind every workspace on the output), preserving compatibility with swaybg.

request.name: get_wallpaper_surface

description.summary: tag a surface with a workspace index

request.description:
Create a wallpaper-surface object that associates surface with workspace_index on the output the surface is placed on. workspace_index is the per-output index as reported by the niri IPC Workspace.idx field (1-based: 1 for the first workspace, 2 for the second, and so on).
The surface must be a layer surface at the Background layer. Calling this on a surface that already has an association replaces the previous one.
If no workspace with that index currently exists on the output, the surface will not be composited until one does.

interface.name: niri_wallpaper_surface_v1

description.summary: workspace association for a single surface

interface.description: Represents the workspace association for a single layer surface. Destroying this object removes the association and reverts the surface to the default all-workspaces behavior.
